location.description: The Google Cloud region to which the target Distributed Cloud Edge zone belongs.

zone.description: The name of the target Distributed Cloud Edge zone.

network_id.description: A unique ID that identifies this network.

labels.description: Labels associated with this resource. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

description.description: A free-text description of the resource. Max length 1024 characters.

mtu.description: IP (L3) MTU value of the network. Default value is `1500`. Possible values are: `1500`, `9000`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
